Name: Bring back the 90s
Description: Let’s start rather easy, give us one of your favorite songs that was released between Jan 1st 1990 and Dec 31st 1999. All genres welcome!

Name: Lyrical geniuses please
Description: Rap or hip hop submissions only. Keeping it simple for the first few rounds let’s get into genres. Give us a good rap or hiphop song for this round.

Name: No originals here
Description: Any cover will count, as long as it’s not the original it will be allowed. Give us a good cover that you really enjoy!

Name: Back to the 80s
Description: Let’s jump back another decade to the 80s. Give us your best song released between Jan 1st 1980 and Dec 31st 1989.

Name: Give me something heavy!
Description: We’ll get a bit more creative with this one, anything heavy works for this round. Heavy metal? Heavy orchestral? Heavy emotions? Whatever fits your definition of heavy works!

Name: How about love?
Description: Okay let’s calm down a bit and highlight one of our favorite emotions. Give us your best love song. As long as love is the theme, it fits the round!

Name: Bring us to the present
Description: Okay anything within the last decade for this round. If it was released after 2015, it works for this round! All genres welcome.

Name: What are they even saying?
Description: Non-English songs only! Any foreign language works, but give us your best song released without the English speaking world being targeted. Will accept songs that are MOSTLY not English, using a few English words is okay as long as it’s not the main language of the song.

Name: Time to head to the country
Description: Let’s explore more genres with a country round. Any artist, any decade, but keep it country people. Songs that make you wanna go muddling and shooting your shotgun

Name: Driving to nowhere
Description: Let’s go a bit abstract here, give us your favorite driving song. Could be themed around driving, or simply a song you enjoy throwing on for a long haul drive. Something I can blast while flying down the highway please.

Name: Instrumental time
Description: Instruments only! No vocals allowed. Covers are fine, but if I hear any lyrics your out for this round.

Name: Rock out
Description: Time for another genre round, let’s rock out like there’s no tomorrow. Alternate rock, heavy rock, classic rock, you name it, all are welcome this round.

Name: I saw that song on the screen!
Description: Any song that was featured in a TV show or a movie works here.

Name: Thanks, Mom and Dad
Description: Songs that your parents listened to when you were a kid that you now love

Name: One Hit Wonders
Description: Well-known songs by bands or artists who never had another hit

Name: Secret finds
Description: Give us an artist none of us have heard of, the more niche the better! No pop artists here, special finds that haven’t blown up yet ideally
